ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "dosing_regimen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dosing regimen used in the study */,
  "route_of_administration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route of administration used in the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed, paused) */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the study */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the study was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the study */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the study was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_dosing_regimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("dosing_regimen_id") REFERENCES dosing_regimens ("dosing_regimen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_route_of_administration_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_of_administration_id") REFERENCES routes_of_administration ("route_of_administration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the subject belongs to */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subject */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the subject */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the subject */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the subject */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the subject */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the subject entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subject entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the subject entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subject entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subjects_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subjects_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subjects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dosing_regimens" (
  "dosing_regimen_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dosing regimen */,
  "dosing_regimen_name" TEXT /* Name of the dosing regimen */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dosing regimen */,
  "dosing_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of dosing (e.g., every 12 hours) */,
  "dosing_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the dosing regimen in days */,
  "dose_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dose */,
  "dose_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the dose (e.g., mg, mg/kg) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dosing regimen */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dosing regimen was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the dosing regimen */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dosing regimen was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dosing_regimen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dosing_regimens_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dosing_regimens_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes_of_administration" (
  "route_of_administration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route of administration */,
  "route_of_administration_name" TEXT /* Name of the route of administration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the route of administration */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of the route (e.g., systemic, local) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the route of administration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the route of administration was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the route of administration */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the route of administration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_of_administration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_of_administration_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_of_administration_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the sample belongs to */,
  "sample_time" REAL /* Time of sample collection */,
  "sample_amount" REAL /* Amount of sample collected */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of the sample (e.g., blood, urine) */,
  "sample_volume" REAL /* Volume of the sample collected */,
  "sample_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the sample volume (e.g., mL) */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method of sample collection */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the sample entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sample entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the sample entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sample entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pk_parameters" (
  "pk_parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PK parameter */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the PK parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the PK parameter (e.g., CL, V, KA) */,
  "parameter_value" REAL /* Value of the PK parameter */,
  "parameter_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the PK parameter (e.g., L/h, L) */,
  "confidence_interval_lower" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval */,
  "confidence_interval_upper" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the PK parameter entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the PK parameter entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the PK parameter entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the PK parameter entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pk_parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pk_parameters_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pk_parameters_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pk_parameters_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pk_profiles" (
  "pk_profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PK profile */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the PK profile belongs to */,
  "time" REAL /* Time points for the PK profile */,
  "concentration" REAL /* Concentration values for the PK profile */,
  "profile_type" TEXT /* Type of the PK profile (e.g., plasma, tissue) */,
  "profile_method" TEXT /* Method used to generate the PK profile */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the PK profile entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the PK profile entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the PK profile entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the PK profile entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pk_profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pk_profiles_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pk_profiles_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pk_profiles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the simulation belongs to */,
  "dosing_regimen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dosing regimen used in the simulation */,
  "simulation_time" REAL /* Time points for the simulation */,
  "simulation_concentration" REAL /* Concentration values for the simulation */,
  "simulation_type" TEXT /* Type of the simulation (e.g., pharmacokinetic, pharmacodynamic) */,
  "simulation_method" TEXT /* Method used for the simulation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the simulation entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the simulation entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_dosing_regimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("dosing_regimen_id") REFERENCES dosing_regimens ("dosing_regimen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has admin privileges */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, view study, edit PK profile) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
